prompt: I'm building a Rete.js node editor and I need to save and load the graph from a database. My nodes are instances of custom classes (NumberNode, AddNode) and they have InputControl values I need to save. What's the right approach for serializing and deserializing the graph including node positions?

assertions.text: Uses area.nodeViews.get(nodeId)?.position (or .position directly) to capture node canvas positions
Serialized connections include sourceOutput and targetInput fields (not just source/target)
editor.clear() is called before re-populating the editor during import
Import uses a factory function or switch statement to re-create node instances by type name
InputControl values are restored on re-created nodes using setValue() or equivalent
